items.name_en: M81153 Orange New Aerogram Brazza Wallet Emphasizing the delicate texture of grained calfskin, with a low-key metal letter brand stamp. Compartments and card slots hold cash, documents, and coins, matching the Aerogram series handbags. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
items.name_cn: M81153 Orange New Aerogram Brazza Wallet Emphasizing the delicate texture of grained calfskin, with a low-key metal letter brand stamp. Compartments and card slots hold cash, documents, and coins, matching the Aerogram series handbags. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M66540 Heart Flower BRAZZA Wallet This Brazza wallet made of Monogram canvas exudes an unstoppable masculine aura. Spacious and fully functional, it easily fits into a coat pocket. Holds coins, credit cards, and bills. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm

items.name_en: M69029💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To celebrate the brand's precious heritage, Louis Vuitton Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh crafted this Brazza wallet using the brand's iconic materials: a combination of Monogram coated canvas and smooth natural calfskin. This wallet is highly functional with many compartments to hold all necessities of modern daily life. Dimensions: 10.0 x 19.0 x 2.0 cm ~

This wallet is highly functional with many compartments to hold all necessities of modern daily life. Dimensions: 10.0 x 19.0 x 2.0 cm ~

items.name_en: M69024💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To continue paying tribute to the brand's design heritage, Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh returns to the Monogram pattern this season, creating this Multiple wallet using the brand's iconic Monogram canvas paired with natural leather. This wallet features multiple pockets and inner compartments, maintaining a compact size while offering practical internal space, easily fitting into most pockets. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9.0 x 1.5 cm ~

items.name_cn:
Top-tier ZIPPY VERTICAL Wallet
M63095 Damier Graphite
This men's vertical zip wallet is made of durable Damier Graphite canvas with an elegant temperament. Multiple practical pockets and compartments easily hold cash, credit cards, and change. 20x10cm.
